creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: marcus->dinoex

This bug looks like an issue with openssl from ports.  This backtrace was 
captured from the crashing sshd process: 

#0  0x00000008024def6c in strcmp () from /lib/libc.so.7 
#1  0x0000000801f63640 in lh_doall_arg () from /lib/libcrypto.so.6

#4  0x0000000803abcd65 in SSL_library_init () from /usr/local/lib/libssl.so.8

from /usr/local/lib/libldap-2.4.so.8

from /usr/local/lib/nss_ldap.so.1
